metadata.title: Ticktasks - Time-Based Action Plan Executor
metadata.description: Create and execute time-based action plans with precision. Perfect for workouts, recipes, study sessions, and any timed routine. Step-by-step execution with real-time timers.
metadata.keywords: time-based plans, action plan executor, workout timer, recipe timer, study planner, task timer, interval training, productivity tool

hero.title: Ticktasks: Time-Based Action Plan Executor
hero.subtitle: Create time-based action plans and execute them step-by-step. Perfect for workouts, recipes, study sessions, and any timed routine.

timedSteps.title: Timed Steps
timedSteps.description: Each step in your plan has a specific duration. Execute plans with real-time timers that guide you through every phase.

stepGroups.title: Repeatable Groups
stepGroups.description: Group steps together and set repetitions. Perfect for interval training, cooking prep, or any repetitive task sequences.

publicPlans.title: Share & Discover
publicPlans.description: Share your plans publicly for others to discover and use. Browse community plans for inspiration and productivity.

bookmarks.title: Save Favorites
bookmarks.description: Bookmark public plans you love and access them instantly. Build your personal library of productivity plans.

step1.title: Create Your Plan
step1.description: Give your plan a title and start adding timed steps. Set hours, minutes, and seconds for each task. Group related steps together and set how many times to repeat them.

step2.title: Organize Your Steps
step2.description: Arrange steps in the order you want to execute them. Use step groups to create repeating sequences, like circuit training rounds or prep cycles.

step3.title: Execute with Precision
step3.description: Launch the plan executor to start your routine. Follow along with real-time timers, audio notifications, and step-by-step guidance through your entire plan.

step4.title: Share or Keep Private
step4.description: Make your plan public to share with the community, or keep it private for personal use. Edit and refine your plans anytime.

workout.title: 🏋️ Workouts
workout.description: Interval training, circuit routines, yoga flows, stretching sequences with precise timing.

cooking.title: 🍳 Cooking
cooking.description: Recipe steps with exact timings, meal prep sequences, baking schedules.

study.title: 📚 Study Sessions
study.description: Pomodoro technique, focused study blocks, timed practice sessions, exam prep routines.

LoginPage.title: Login
LoginPage.description: Log in to Ticktasks to start creating and managing plans.

metadata.title: Login - Ticktasks
metadata.description: Log in to your Ticktasks account to create, manage, and execute your time-based action plans.
metadata.keywords: login, sign in, ticktasks login, user account

form.noAccount: Do not have an account? Register to Ticktasks
form.forgotPassword: Forgot your password? Reset it here

RegisterPage.title: Register
RegisterPage.description: Create a Ticktasks account to start creating and managing plans.

metadata.title: Register - Ticktasks
metadata.description: Create your free Ticktasks account to start building time-based action plans, share with the community, and organize your tasks.
metadata.keywords: register, sign up, create account, ticktasks registration, new user

form.usernameTitle: Username must be 2-30 characters and contain only letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens
form.passwordTitle: Password must be at least 8 characters and contain at least one letter and one number

ForgotPasswordPage.title: Forgot Password
ForgotPasswordPage.description: Enter your username xor email to reset your password.

metadata.title: Forgot Password - Ticktasks
metadata.description: Reset your Ticktasks password. Enter your username or email to receive password reset instructions.
metadata.keywords: forgot password, password reset, account recovery, ticktasks password

ResetPasswordPage.title: Reset Your Password
ResetPasswordPage.description: Please enter a new password for your account.

invalidLink.title: Invalid Reset Link
invalidLink.description: The password reset link is invalid or incomplete. Please request a new password reset.

description.intro: Manage your Ticktasks account settings and credentials. Update your profile information and change your password.
description.features: Keep your account secure and your information up to date. Manage your username, email, and password all in one place.

metadata.title: Account Settings - Ticktasks
metadata.description: Manage your Ticktasks account. Update your profile, change your password, and keep your information secure.
metadata.keywords: account settings, profile, user settings, change password, update account

auth.title: Authorization Required
auth.description: You must be logged in to view or update your account credentials.

metadata.keywords: create plan, new plan, build plan, custom plan, workout plan, recipe plan, study plan

auth.title: Authentication Required
auth.description: Please log in or register to edit a plan. You'll be redirected back here after authentication.

description.intro: Discover task plans created and shared by the Ticktasks community. Browse through a diverse collection of productivity strategies, project templates, and daily routines shared by users worldwide.
description.features: Search by title, bookmark your favorites, and get inspired by how others organize their tasks and achieve their goals.
